changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_constraint c WHERE c.conname = 'chk_page_type' AND pg_get_constraintdef(c.oid) LIKE '%CHILD_SAMPLE_CREATION%'

changeSet.comment: Update CHECK constraint to add CHILD_SAMPLE_CREATION for aliquoting workflow pages.

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create Aliquoting / Bulk Sample Import page for MNTD Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Create child samples (aliquots) from parent samples and route them to analyzer plates for internal analysis. Select parent samples, configure aliquot type (Tube, Plate 96-well, Cryobox 9×9 or 10×10), specify number of aliquots per parent, and set ID prefix. Aliquot IDs are auto-generated (e.g., MNTD-ALQ-2024-001). Upload plate maps or box layouts for bulk import. Track initial volume per aliquot and remaining volume on parent samples. Route completed aliquots to analyzer plates with automatic well assignment.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Malaria and Neglected Tropical Disease (MNTD) Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5

changeSet.author: openelis-mntd

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'MNTD' AND display_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Insert MNTD Aliquoting workflow page template

column.name: description
column.value: Create child samples (aliquots) and route to analyzer plates for internal analysis

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Select parent samples and create aliquots. Configure aliquot type (Tube, Plate 96-well, Cryobox), number per parent, and ID prefix. Upload plate maps for bulk import. Track volume. Route aliquots to analyzer plates with automatic well assignment.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Aliquoting / Bulk Sample Import - Child sample creation and analyzer plate routing
